afterFileEdit.prompt: An edit just finished. If the edited file is documentation (e.g. .md) or a schema/enum/config/JSON that other docs or assets depend on, gently note that a sync check via the document-review-sync-check skill (L1 reference existence / L2 parameter consistency / L3 reverse propagation) may be warranted before treating the change as complete. This is advisory only: do NOT block, do NOT auto-run a full review, keep it to a one-line reminder. If the file is unrelated, stay silent. Hook input: $ARGUMENTS
